name: speechlab-api
description: SpeechLab AI dubbing platform API guide. Teaches Claude how to use the SpeechLab API — auth, projects, translations, dubs, segments, billing, file uploads, the expand=true direct-download path, and the gotchas (s3:// unsupported, dub vs dubs naming, selectedFormat silent fail, etc.) that aren't obvious from the OpenAPI spec.
